content:
type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
summary: dry_run done: I pop dry_run=params.pop('dry_run', False) right after the docstring (before filename/open_fp logic), and use io.BytesIO() as fp when dry_run is True at the 'created = False' block, skipping fp.close()/os.remove when dry_run. Tests added: test_dry_run and test_dry_run_error right after test_string. Should be low-collision with your backup logic if you insert near the builtins.open() branch.
